label: IBS Mean Reversion
signal: Buy IBS<thresh at next open; exit IBS>thresh or stop.
description: Internal Bar Strength (IBS) mean reversion on daily bars. IBS = (close − low) / (high − low). Enters long at next open when IBS < ibs_buy (close near the day's low → oversold); exits at close when IBS > ibs_sell, or at a fixed stop. Long only, multi-day holds allowed.
reference: Pagonidis, 'The IBS Effect: Mean Reversion in Equity ETFs'; multi-asset extension proprietary
